== Notes for [[Item:Q89146|Q89146]] ==

Enlil-Nasir II was the king of Assyria from 1420 BC to 1414 BC. The brother of Ashur-nadin-ahhe I, he seized the throne in a successful coup.

Preceded by Ashur-nadin-ahhe I King of Assyria 1420–1414 BCE Succeeded by Ashur-nirari II

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enlil-Nasir_II
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Assyrian_kings

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
